cleavage agent: in-gel trypsin digestion followed by MS analysis.
fractionation method: sodium dodecyl sulfate polyacrylamide gel electrophoresis.
fragmentation method: analyzed using a Q Exactive (Thermo Fisher Scientific).
instrument: using Advance LC (AMR, Tokyo, Japan) and Q Exactive (Thermo Fisher Scientific).
reduction reagent: 0.1 mM DTT, and protease inhibitor cocktail (Nacalai Tesque).
reduction concentration: 0.1 mM DTT, and protease inhibitor cocktail (Nacalai Tesque).
